_instructions: Fill in all addresses before running deploy-mainnet.js. NEVER commit this file with real private keys.

timelock._note: 48 hours — gives investors/CMA time to react to admin actions

multisig._adminNote: 3-of-5 Gnosis Safe. Holds DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE via Timelock.
multisig._compNote: CMA-approved compliance officer. Holds COMPLIANCE_ROLE directly (no timelock — must act fast for regulatory orders).
multisig._issuerNote: Asset issuer (ROSHN SPV wallet). Holds ISSUER_ROLE.
multisig._managerNote: Asset manager. Holds MANAGER_ROLE in YieldDistributor.

sarx._note: Production SAR stablecoin. Must be audited and CMA-approved. NOT MockERC20.
